title: Code node fails to access previous node outputs
symptom: The Code node throws an 'Unknown Error' when trying to access outputs from the Aggregate node using the standard syntax. This issue arises specifically when the Aggregate node outputs more than one item.
applies_when: Aggregate node outputs more than one item
not_this_if: Aggregate node outputs only one item
root_cause: The Code node cannot access the output of the Aggregate node using the standard `.item.json` syntax when the Aggregate node outputs multiple items. This is due to the way n8n handles item references in nodes that output varying item counts.
fix_steps: Change the reference in the Code node to $('Aggregate1').first().json.gmail_labels
Test the Code node again to ensure it accesses the data correctly
agent_instruction: Update the Code node to use the first item from the Aggregate node's output.
